mapper.select: SELECT company_code FROM lia_company WHERE active_flag = 'Y' ORDER BY company_code LIMIT 1
SELECT company_code, policy_no, policy_seq, change_seq, insured_amount FROM lia_policy WHERE active_flag = 'Y' ORDER BY updated_at DESC, policy_no LIMIT 1
SELECT customer_id, customer_name, customer_type, id_type, id_no FROM lia_customer WHERE active_flag = 'Y' ORDER BY updated_at DESC, customer_id LIMIT 1
SELECT product_code, product_name FROM lia_product WHERE active_flag = 'Y' ORDER BY updated_at DESC, product_code LIMIT 1
SELECT pay_period_type, pay_period FROM lia_payment WHERE active_flag = 'Y' ORDER BY updated_at DESC, payment_id LIMIT 1
